'''chahupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocolet|jocolet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocolet|jocolet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chahupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæhipith|chæhipith]] || [[word:chæhipij|chæhipij]] || [[word:chæhipish|chæhipish]] || [[word:chæhipi|chæhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahuhuputh|chahuhuputh]] || [[word:chahuhupuj|chahuhupuj]] || [[word:chahuhupush|chahuhupush]] || [[word:chahuhupu|chahuhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahuputh|chahuputh]] || [[word:chahupuj|chahupuj]] || [[word:chahupush|chahupush]] || [[word:chahupu|chahupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahufpufth|chahufpufth]] || [[word:chahufpufj|chahufpufj]] || [[word:chahufpufsh|chahufpufsh]] || [[word:chahufpuf|chahufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chahuputhu|chahuputhu]] || [[word:chahupuju|chahupuju]] || [[word:chahupushu|chahupushu]] || [[word:chahupuku|chahupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chahuputh|chahuputh]] || [[word:chahupuj|chahupuj]] || [[word:chahupush|chahupush]] || [[word:chahupu|chahupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chahuputhul|chahuputhul]] || [[word:chahupujul|chahupujul]] || [[word:chahupushul|chahupushul]] || [[word:chahupukul|chahupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chahupuuthuthu|chahupuuthuthu]] || [[word:chahupuujuju|chahupuujuju]] || [[word:chahupuushushu|chahupuushushu]] || [[word:chahupuuku|chahupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chahuputhun|chahuputhun]] || [[word:chahupujun|chahupujun]] || [[word:chahupushun|chahupushun]] || [[word:chahupukun|chahupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chahuputhuoro|chahuputhuoro]] || [[word:chahupujuoro|chahupujuoro]] || [[word:chahupushuoro|chahupushuoro]] || [[word:chahupukuoro|chahupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
